name: Concentric AB (publ)
summary: Concentric AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and distributes solutions for engine and hydraulic applications in the Americas, Europe, and internationally. Its engine products include lubricant, coolant, fuel transfer pumps, and oil mist separators for diesel engines, transmissions, and compressors. The company's hydraulic products comprise gear and gerotor pumps, as well as hydraulic power packs and hybrid systems for installation in various industrial vehicles and diesel engines; and motors and systems for mobile equipment. Its products are used in trucks, industrial applications, construction equipment, and agricultural machinery markets. The company was founded in 1921 and is headquartered in Link√É¬∂ping, Sweden.
